name: Beef with Wine and Mushroom Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 lb Beef chuck cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the beef with salt and pepper.
2. Pour the mushroom soup and red wine over the beef.
3. Cover the dish and bake for 3 hours at 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Serve with noodles or rice.
